note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.Permanently delete %(name)s? This snapsh: Delete permanently in % (name)? This snapshot for audit_logging and cannot be undone.
This account was archived on % (date) s.
et_back.of %(limit)s spots left — no credit card: % (limit) s of places left — no credit card required.
et_back.Write off %(number)s ($%(balance)s) as a: Write down % (number) s ($% (balance) s) as bad debt? The engine will recover the GST and the bill bill.
et_back.over %(days)s days past due: over % (days) s past term of days
et_back.A scheduled job writes these off automat: Scheduled work automatically writes them out when they pass the % (days) s-day threshold. This screen is only a readable preview of what the next run will work.
et_back.No prompts or buttons — switch the compa: No prompts or buttons — switch the company to % (mode) s mode in the settings to write off from here.
et_back.A receipt of %(amount)s just came in. If: The receipt in % (amount) just came in. If it's money recovered against a debt you'd already written off, save it as a bad debt collection — the engine posts it on % (account) s income (no GST). Otherwise, dismiss the receipt and keep it as a normal payment.
et_back.No %(status)s transactions for this acco: % (status) s transactions are not available for this account.
et_back.The form below now shows %(values)s with: The form below now shows in % (values) where the current version number of the server has been applied — so your next recording uses the correct base. If you want to start fresh instead from the current state of the server,
et_back.This bank account was archived on %(date: This bank account was archived on % (date) s. Back to % (link) s to view it.
et_back.This bill is %(status)s and cannot be ed: This draft is % (status) s and cannot be edited.
This budget was archived on % (date) s.
et_back.%(cashbook)s is the simplest way to keep: % (cashbook) s is the easiest way to store books for the sole trader or microbusiness. Log in, cash out, and what category each transaction falls into. That's what it is.
et_back.It's free. There's no signup funnel, no: It's free. There is no sign-up funnel, no usage limit, upsell pop-up. The % (link) s free connection edition runs out of the Cashbook box and your data lives on your own server (or demo server if it is a public demo).
et_back.The ATO requires that issued invoices st: The ATO requires that the bills issued remain on the audit trail. So Cashbook doesn't have a "delete" button for the invoices sent — only % (void) s, which writes a reversal record. If you've never thought about differentiating it, that's exactly the idea: right is the only button you see.
et_back.Choose %(term)s when crediting pre-regis: Choose % (term) s when crediting pre-registration invoices that must be reissued with GST.
et_back.Select credit note %(number)s: Select the credit note in % (number) s
et_back.This credit note is %(status)s and canno: This credit note is % (status) s and cannot be edited.
et_back.SHA-256 of the exact bytes that %(status: SHA-256 of exact bytes, which % (status) s
This property was realized on % (date) s.
et_back.A new %(term)s contact will be created a: The new % (term) s contact is created and hidden from your main /contact list.
et_back.This invoice is %(status)s and cannot be: This invoice is % (status) s and cannot be edited.
This item was archived on % (date) s.
et_back.This journal entry is %(status)s and can: This journal entry is % (status) s and cannot be edited.
et_back.This payment is %(status)s and cannot be: This payment is % (status) s and cannot be edited.
This project was archived on % (date) s.
et_back.Select purchase order %(number)s: Select a purchase order in % (number) s
et_back.Receipt quantity for line %(line_no)s: Amount of reception for line % (line_no) s
et_back.The pipeline is under construction. Clic: The pipeline is under construction. Clicking the PDF below % (send) will render, write the .eml + audi log, but in % (noemail) s until both gates are flipped: % (gate1) s AND % (gate2) s. See % (planpath) s.
et_back.This recurring invoice has status %(stat: This recurring invoice has a status in % (status) s and cannot be edited.
et_back.— no outstanding payables as at %(date)s: - no outstanding means of payment as in % (date) -
et_back.Balance sheet is NOT balanced — differen: Balance sheet is NOT balanced — difference: % (diff) s
et_back.%(label)s is not derived here — it's an: % (label) is not derived here — this is the pre-tax payment entered by the ATO and directly filed with the BAS. Add it to the quantity below if your BAS shows it.
et_back.Net GST (%(gst)s) + PAYG withheld (%(pay: Net GST (% (gst) s) + PAYG withheld (% (payg) s)
et_back.Revenue concentration risk — %(pct)s%% f: Risk of revenue concentration — % (pct) s%% from one customer
et_back.Post the close-year journal and lock the: Post your next year's diary and lock the period through % (through)? It's hard to undo.
et_back.Nothing to close through %(through)s — e: You can't close anything via % (through) s — every P&L account is already zero.
et_back.In the opinion of the trustee of %(entit: % (entity) s in the opinion of the trustee:
et_back.the financial statements present fairly: the financial statements fairly state the financial position as at % (date) and then the result of the year ended; and
et_back.issued from %(date)s onward did not incl: issued in % (date) s onward did not contain GST. You should review these invoices and issue credit notes or revised invoices to take into account the GST that should have been claimed.
et_back.No invoices without GST were found from: No invoices were found further in % (date) s without GST.
Add the extraction tip to % (supplier) s. The tip redirects the AI parser by swallowing future statements from this supplier.
This tax code was archived on % (date) s.
et_back.No filable document export is wired up f: No fileable document exports for % (jurisdiction) s % (return_type) s are wired yet — submit it via your channel (e.g. EMTA e-service) and label it as once made below.

ru_back.Permanently delete %(name)s? This snapsh: Remove% (name) s continuously? These photos are in the audit_log and cannot be cancelled.
This account was archived by a percentage (date) s.
ru_back.of %(limit)s spots left — no credit card: The remaining points (limit) s — no credit card is required.
ru_back.Write off %(number)s ($%(balance)s) as a: Write down ZQX0Z ($% (balance) s) as a bad debt? The engine recovers the GST and prepares the bill.
ru_back.A scheduled job writes these off automat: Planned work automatically removes them after they cross the threshold of% (days) from day to day. This screen is just a preliminary idea of what the next race will be.
ru_back.No prompts or buttons — switch the compa: No calls or buttons — switch the company to a mode of% (mode) s in the machines to remove it from here.
ru_back.A receipt of %(amount)s just came in. If: If the money recovers against the debt that you have already written off, register it as debt recovery — the engine directs it to a percentage (account) s income (without GST). Otherwise, reject and keep the receipt as a normal payment.
ru_back.The form below now shows %(values)s with: The following form now shows the percentage (values) s with the current server number, so the following savings will be used on the right base. If you want to start over with the current state of the server,
ru_back.This bank account was archived on %(date: This bank account was archived at a percentage (date) s. Go back to a percentage (link) s to see.
ru_back.This bill is %(status)s and cannot be ed: The bill is a% (status) s and cannot be edited.
ru_back.Edit Budget %(year)s/%(month)s: Drafting budget per cent (year) s/ per cent (month) s
ru_back.%(cashbook)s is the simplest way to keep: Cashbook s is the easiest way to keep books for a single trader or microenterprise. You're investing money, you're punching money out, and what kind of deal is it? There you go.
ru_back.It's free. There's no signup funnel, no: It's free. There are no records, no restrictions on use, no advertisements. The free release of “% (link) s” on the Cashbook base comes out of the box, and your data lives on your own server (or on a demo server if it's a public demo).
ru_back.The ATO requires that issued invoices st: The ATO requires that the accounts issued remain in the auditing system. So there's no "remove" button in the Cashbook for the bills sent out — only a% (void) s that writes the reverse record. If you've never thought about this difference, that's the point: the right thing to do is the only button you'll see.
ru_back.Choose %(term)s when crediting pre-regis: Select% (term) s on pre-registration invoices that need to be reissued by GST.
ru_back.This credit note is %(status)s and canno: This credit note is a% (status) s and cannot be edited.
ru_back.SHA-256 of the exact bytes that %(status: SHA-256 of the effect bytes that QQX0Z
ru_back.This invoice is %(status)s and cannot be: This account is a% (status) s and cannot be edited.
This paragraph was archived by a percentage (date) s.
ru_back.This journal entry is %(status)s and can: This magazine is a% (status) s, and it cannot be edited.
(pct) sQX1Z in the amount of US$ 75,000.
ru_back.This payment is %(status)s and cannot be: This payment is a percentage (status) s and cannot be edited.
This project was archived by a percentage (date) s.
ru_back.Receipt quantity for line %(line_no)s: Number of admission to the line% (line_no) s
ru_back.The pipeline is under construction. Clic: This pipeline is under construction. By pressing "% (send) s" below, PDF, write "eml + audit journal", but "% (noemail) s" until both gates turn:% (gate1) s and% (gate2) s. (planpath) s.
ru_back.Select recurring invoice %(name)s: Selection of periodic invoices per cent (name) s

ru_back.— no outstanding receivables as at %(dat: - Absence of unliquidated accounts receivable as a percentage (date) s -

ru_back.Nothing to close through %(through)s — e: Nothing closes at% (through) s — every P&L account is already zero.
ru_back.For the year ended %(date)s: For a year that has ended at a percentage (date) s
ru_back.For the period %(from)s → %(to)s: For a period of% (from) s →% (to) s
ru_back.the financial statements present fairly: The financial statements accurately reflect the financial position at per cent (date) s and the results for the year ended; and
Add a clue on extraction for% (supplier) s. The clue sends Parser AI when he swallows the supplier’s future statements.
